01 / 05
01 — Introduction

One platform. Four audiences. Zero fragmentation.

MDO's digital transformation demands a unified, secure, and scalable platform — serving the public, investors, staff, and visitors simultaneously, governed centrally under one foundation.

◎

Public Portal

External audiences — general public, investors, and partners.

▱

Internal Portal

MDO staff, operational teams, and building visitors.

◇

Unified Foundation

One codebase, one admin interface, one hosting environment.

02 — Proposal Submitted

A discovery-first proposal.

Workflow details, approval chains, and integration specs are confirmed during the Planning Phase — in structured discovery sessions with MDO's Communication Team, IT department, and departmental stakeholders.

📎 Refer to the submitted proposal document
▦

Centralised governance and auditability

⌘

Investor lifecycle management and bilingual workflow support

⚙

Integration flexibility and long-term operational scalability

MDO Digital ProposalPrepared by DeepAstra
04 / 05
04 — Proposal Thinking

Each audience. Its own interface. One foundation.

Each audience operates under a different trust level and requires a different set of workflows — yet all four are governed centrally, branded consistently, and maintained by a single admin team.

🏛

Public Portal

General public and investors — discovery, portfolio, and Invest/Partner flows.

🔐

Investor Portal — ICRM

Investor lifecycle management — applications, documents, KYC, and status tracking.

🏢

Internal Portal

Staff intranet — announcements, documents, visitor management, and system integrations.

📲

Visitor Check-In

QR-based tablet check-in — automatic host notification and floor-based access.

MDO Digital ProposalPrepared by DeepAstra

not final work.
